Metadata.title: SKYW Group | Skyward Holding Group
Metadata.description: Skyward Holding Group is an international financial institution licensed by the Hong Kong SFC (Type 6 & Type 9), with business spanning fund management, IPO cornerstone investment, gold, commercial credit guarantee, and energy projects.
Metadata.ogDescription: Connecting Global Capital with Innovative Industries

Home.heroTagline: Hard Assets · New Tech · Hong Kong Compliant Gateway
Home.heroSubtitle: Hong Kong's SFC-licensed investment platform purpose-built for Belt & Road investors — connecting the Gulf, ASEAN, and Central Asia with China's most dynamic capital markets.
Home.gatewayTitle: Your Bridge to China, Built on Asia's Gold Standard of Regulation
Home.gatewaySubtitle: For Belt & Road investors seeking reliable, transparent access to China and Eastern markets, Hong Kong offers an unmatched combination of regulatory credibility, legal clarity, and financial connectivity.
Home.gateway1Desc: Holding SFC Type 6 and Type 9 licenses — Hong Kong's most rigorous financial designations — ensures every transaction meets world-class compliance standards.
Home.gateway2Desc: Our Qianhai QFLP and QDIE dual channels provide compliant, streamlined pathways between international capital and onshore Chinese investment opportunities.
Home.gateway3Desc: Fund structures denominated in USD, HKD, and RMB accommodate diverse investor requirements across the Gulf, ASEAN, and beyond.
Home.gateway4Desc: Hong Kong's independent judiciary and common law framework give international investors the legal familiarity and investor protection they require.
Home.corridorSubtitle: With offices across five key hubs, we actively serve investors from every major corridor of the Belt & Road Initiative.
Home.corridor1Desc: Dubai office serving GCC sovereign funds, family offices, and institutions with a focus on gold, energy, and diversified fund strategies.
Home.corridor2Desc: Singapore hub connecting Southeast Asian institutions to Hong Kong IPO opportunities, RMB fixed income, and cross-border structured products.
Home.corridor3Desc: Shenzhen operations centre bridging Mainland China's institutional capital with offshore HK structures via QFLP, QDIE, and direct co-investment.
Home.corridor4Desc: Dedicated outreach to sovereign and institutional investors across Pakistan, Bangladesh, Central Asia, and the wider Belt & Road corridor.
Home.corridor5Desc: London presence supporting European family offices and institutions seeking regulated HK-domiciled exposure to Asia-Pacific and Chinese assets.
Home.businessSubtitle: Six complementary investment strategies: HK Precious Metals & Digital Gold, HK Capital Markets, China New Innovation, Digital Trade & Technology, Green Energy Investment, and Web3 Finance — providing compliant access to Eastern assets for Middle Eastern, Singapore, and overseas Chinese capital.
Home.aboutDescription: Skyward Holding Group (SKYW) is a Hong Kong-headquartered international financial institution holding SFC Type 6 and Type 9 licenses. We have managed over $2 billion in assets and supported 30+ institutional investors across the Belt & Road region in accessing China and Eastern capital markets. Our platform combines Hong Kong's regulatory infrastructure with a global network spanning Dubai, Singapore, Shenzhen, and London.
Home.insightsSubtitle: Market analysis and perspectives from the Belt & Road corridors
Home.ctaTitle: Begin Your Eastern Asset Allocation Journey
Home.ctaSubtitle: Join 30+ institutional investors from the Gulf, ASEAN, and beyond who trust Skyward Holding as their gateway to China's capital markets.
Home.ecosystemSubtitle: Skyward's platform is anchored by three institutional shareholders and strategic partners — spanning mainland China's innovation economy, European alternative finance, and Asia's leading state-owned bank.
Home.ecosystem1Desc: Joint venture of CAS Innovation (中科院国科创新) and China Resources Capital (华润资本). Founded 2017, AMAC-registered private fund manager (No. P1067569). AUM RMB 6B+, 70+ portfolio companies in hard tech, AI, biomedical, and advanced manufacturing.
Home.ecosystem2Desc: European alternative fund platform founded in 1995. Regulated in London (FCA), Norway and Malta. AUM USD 24B+, serving 300+ institutional clients across 35 countries. Provides international-standard fund compliance, trading infrastructure, and risk isolation.
Home.ecosystem3Desc: Singapore MAS-licensed fund manager (RLFMC), holding QFII and CIBM qualifications for direct China market access. Jointly owned by Bank of China (83.5%) and BlackRock (16.5%). Co-manages BOCAM-GBA International Select Fund (target AUM HKD 5B).
Home.fundArchSubtitle: Singapore, Hong Kong, and Shenzhen Qianhai — three regulatory jurisdictions, one integrated structure for international capital to access China and Eastern assets compliantly.
Home.trackSubtitle: Our team has served as cornerstone or anchor investor in over 30 Hong Kong and A+H IPO projects spanning AI chips, robotics, biotech, and new consumer brands.
Home.trackNote: Representative investments only. Past participation does not guarantee future performance.
Home.lpTitle: Three Paths to Access Our Platform
Home.lpSubtitle: We are actively seeking qualified institutional investors, family offices, and sovereign funds to co-invest and grow together.
Home.lpPath1Desc: Open to qualified investors. Singapore VCC structure managed by Bank of China Asset Management (MAS). Target AUM HKD 5B. Minimum HKD 1M. Monthly subscription, quarterly redemption.
Home.lpPath2Desc: Participate alongside Skyward in Hong Kong IPO cornerstone and anchor positions. Access to pre-IPO allocation in AI, biotech, and new consumer listings on HKEX.
Home.lpPath3Desc: Contact our investor relations team to receive the full Information Memorandum, fund term sheet, and KYC checklist for any of our active fund structures.

About.heroSubtitle: A globally oriented international financial institution rooted in Hong Kong
About.overviewP1: Skyward Holding Group ("SKYW") is a fully licensed international financial institution headquartered in Hong Kong. The Group holds SFC Type 6 (Corporate Finance) and Type 9 (Asset Management) licenses, plus AMAC-registered domestic fund operations (恒邦资本, No. P1067569) and a Singapore MAS-regulated fund management structure via Bank of China Asset Management (Singapore). This multi-jurisdiction platform spans Hong Kong, Shenzhen Qianhai, and Singapore — purpose-built for cross-border capital flows between international investors and Chinese assets.
About.overviewP2: Founded with the mission of "Connecting Global Capital with Innovative Industries," SKYW is backed by two institutional shareholders: Hengbang Capital (CAS Innovation + China Resources Capital, AUM RMB 6B+) and AKJ Group (European hedge fund platform, AUM USD 24B+). To date, the Group has managed over USD 2B in assets and participated in 30+ Hong Kong and A+H IPO cornerstone and anchor investments.
About.vision: To become a leading comprehensive international financial group in the Asia-Pacific region, earning the trust of global investors through outstanding investment capabilities and professional service quality.
About.mission: Connecting global capital with innovative industries, creating long-term value for clients through professional investment management and diversified financial services.
About.license6Desc: Advising on Corporate Finance (Central No. BBM628) — M&A advisory, capital markets structuring, IPO financial advisory, and corporate restructuring.
About.license9Desc: Asset Management (Central No. BOP785, held by Zhuogao Asset Management) — Professional fund management for institutional investors and HNW clients. AUM ~USD 1B.
About.license3Desc: China Association for Fund Industry private fund manager registration (No. P1067569), via Hengbang Capital in Shenzhen Qianhai — enabling QFLP domestic fund operations and RMB-denominated investments.
About.license4Desc: Fund management via BOCAM Singapore (Regulated Licensed Fund Management Company, MAS). Holding QFII and CIBM qualifications for direct China onshore market access.
About.licensesNote: SKYW operates across four regulated jurisdictions: HK SFC · China AMAC · Singapore MAS · European FCA/Finanstilsynet/MFSA (via AKJ)
About.backingSubtitle: SKYW's institutional depth is grounded in three pillars — mainland China's innovation capital, European alternative finance, and Asia's leading state-owned asset manager.
About.backing1Sub: 恒邦资本 · AMAC No. P1067569
About.backing1Shareholders: CAS Innovation (中科院国科创新) + China Resources Capital (华润资本)
About.backing1Body: Founded 2017. AUM RMB 6B+, 70+ portfolio companies. Core focus: hard tech, AI, biomedical, advanced manufacturing, and green energy. Representative investments include 中科闻歌, 云天励飞, and 慧智微电子. Provides QFLP domestic fund management, Shenzhen Qianhai operations, and deep mainland deal flow.
About.backing2Shareholders: Regulated: FCA London · Finanstilsynet Norway · MFSA Malta
About.backing2Body: European alternative fund platform with AUM USD 24B+, serving 35 countries and 300+ institutional clients. Provides international-standard fund compliance, custody infrastructure, trading execution, and risk isolation. Covers both traditional securities and digital assets.
About.backing3Sub: 中银（新加坡）资管 · MAS RLFMC
About.backing3Body: MAS-regulated fund management company established in Singapore. Holds QFII and CIBM qualifications. Co-manages the BOCAM-GBA International Select Investment Fund (Singapore VCC, target AUM HKD 5B). Parent BOC Fund AUM RMB 745.9B+, serving 34 million clients globally.
About.globalSubtitle: The Group maintains offices across major financial centers worldwide, building a business network spanning Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, and Europe.

Business.heroSubtitle: Six business divisions covering the complete value chain from asset management to industrial investment
Business.coopProcessDesc: We follow a standardized and efficient cooperation process to ensure every partnership proceeds smoothly
Business.coopProcess1Desc: Reach out to us via the contact form or email to introduce your cooperation intentions and background
Business.coopProcess2Desc: Our team will respond within 2 business days to conduct an initial needs assessment
Business.coopProcess3Desc: Our professional team will develop a customized cooperation proposal based on your needs
Business.coopProcess4Desc: Both parties will discuss cooperation details in depth and sign a formal cooperation agreement upon reaching consensus
Business.coopTypesDesc: We welcome various forms of business cooperation
Business.coopType1Desc: Joint fund establishment, project investment, equity investment, and other diversified investment cooperation opportunities
Business.coopType2Desc: Establish strategic partnership with industry-leading enterprises to achieve complementary advantages
Business.coopType3Desc: Welcome various channel partners to jointly expand market and serve customers
Business.coopType4Desc: Conduct in-depth cooperation on specific projects to jointly discover and seize market opportunities
Business.coopCtaDesc: Ready to create value together with us?

ipo.title: HK Capital Markets — Primary & Secondary
ipo.shortDesc: Full-cycle participation in Hong Kong's capital markets through IPO cornerstone allocation and secondary market strategy, backed by SFC Type 6 and Type 9 licenses.
ipo.heroSubtitle: SFC-licensed, full-cycle participation in Hong Kong's capital markets
ipo.overviewP1: Holding SFC Type 6 and Type 9 licenses, SkyW participates across the full Hong Kong capital markets cycle. In primary markets, SkyW acts as cornerstone and anchor investor in Hong Kong IPOs — providing institutional credibility signals that materially improve subscription rates and pricing stability.
ipo.overviewP2: Recent participation spans hard tech (Cambricon, UBTECH, Horizon Robotics), new consumption (Laopuzhuang, Mixue, Guti), and healthcare (Insilico Medicine, Lepu Biopharma). In secondary markets, SkyW leverages deep primary market intelligence to identify opportunities in Hong Kong's new economy sectors.
ipo.advantage1Desc: Rigorous investment committee process with deep sector expertise across tech, healthcare and consumption
ipo.advantage2Desc: Cornerstone participation materially enhances IPO subscription rates and reduces first-day break risk
ipo.advantage3Desc: Preferential share allocation with structured lock-up, optimizing entry price and exit timing
ipo.advantage4Desc: Post-listing IR support, secondary market management and strategic advisory for portfolio companies

gold.title: HK Precious Metals & Digital Gold
gold.shortDesc: Hong Kong-based precious metals infrastructure spanning physical gold, on-chain tokenization, and institutional vault custody, with G-COIN backed by 100% allocated physical reserves.
gold.heroSubtitle: Physical reserves as foundation, digital technology redefining global gold circulation
gold.overviewP1: Hong Kong stands as one of the world's four major gold pricing centers — the only compliant gateway connecting mainland China with international precious metals markets. SkyW Capital has built a fully integrated precious metals financial infrastructure spanning physical gold trading, refining, on-chain tokenization, and vault custody.
gold.overviewP2: G-COIN Digital Gold Platform operates on 100% physical gold reserves verified by independent auditors. Key capabilities: T+0 settlement, cross-border atomic swaps bypassing SWIFT friction, full physical redemption channel retained for sovereign-grade clients.
gold.feature1Desc: 100% allocated physical gold backing, independently audited and fully transparent
gold.feature2Desc: G-COIN on-chain gold enables T+0 settlement and seamless cross-border transfers
gold.feature3Desc: Integrated operations across trading, refining, tokenization and vault custody
gold.feature4Desc: Hong Kong LBMA-recognized clearing, directly connected to London and New York markets

energy.title: Green Energy & Sustainable Investment
energy.shortDesc: Long-duration capital connecting China's green manufacturing edge with rising clean energy demand from the Middle East and Southeast Asia.
energy.heroSubtitle: Long-term capital for the energy transition, connecting Chinese manufacturing with global green demand
energy.overviewTitle: China's Green Industrial Advantage Meets Global Capital Demand
energy.overviewP1: The global net-zero transition represents a multi-trillion dollar capital reallocation opportunity. China's manufacturing leadership in solar, energy storage and EV supply chains, combined with surging green energy demand from the Middle East and Southeast Asia, creates a compelling cross-border investment thesis.
energy.overviewP2: SkyW structures green energy funds connecting international sovereign capital with China's industrial leaders in clean energy. Managed through Hong Kong OFC and Qianhai QFLP structure, providing Middle Eastern and Southeast Asian sovereign funds with a compliant channel into China's green industrial ecosystem.
energy.area1Desc: Solar, energy storage, hydrogen and next-generation clean power technologies
energy.area2Desc: Battery systems, drive technology and charging infrastructure supporting global EV transition
energy.area3Desc: Overseas green energy project participation and ESG-compliant infrastructure investment
energy.area4Desc: Structured ESG-compliant funds designed for sovereign and institutional mandate requirements

chinaInnovation.title: China New Innovation Investment
chinaInnovation.shortDesc: A Hong Kong OFC and Qianhai QFLP dual-platform structure giving global LPs compliant access to China's strategic emerging industries.
chinaInnovation.heroSubtitle: Dual-platform structure offering global LPs a compliant channel into China's strategic emerging industries
chinaInnovation.overviewTitle: Hong Kong OFC + Qianhai QFLP Dual Platform
chinaInnovation.overviewP1: SkyW's Hong Kong OFC and Qianhai QFLP dual-platform structure provides global institutional investors with a fully compliant channel into China's strategic emerging industries. Capital raised via SFC-licensed OFC in Hong Kong, supported by AKJ Group (AUM USD 25B+, regulated across three European jurisdictions).
chinaInnovation.overviewP2: Deployed onshore via Qianhai QFLP qualification (AMAC registration P1067569), co-managed with Hengbang Capital (backed by CAS National Innovation and China Resources Capital, AUM RMB 6B+). Exit primarily via Hong Kong listing and strategic M&A, with clear USD repatriation framework for international LPs.
chinaInnovation.feature1Desc: Artificial intelligence applications, large language models and next-generation computing infrastructure
chinaInnovation.feature2Desc: Robotics, autonomous systems and embodied intelligence — China's next industrial frontier
chinaInnovation.feature3Desc: Innovative drugs, medical devices and digital health platforms with global commercialization potential
chinaInnovation.feature4Desc: Semiconductors, precision equipment and smart manufacturing enabling China's industrial upgrade

digitalTrade.title: Digital Trade & Technology
digitalTrade.shortDesc: Digital financial infrastructure for cross-border trade, spanning trade finance, receivables tokenization, payment rails, and supply chain credit across Belt and Road corridors.
digitalTrade.heroSubtitle: Rebuilding cross-border trade infrastructure for the Belt and Road era
digitalTrade.overviewTitle: Digital Financial Infrastructure at the Trade-Capital Intersection
digitalTrade.overviewP1: Global cross-border trade is undergoing structural reorganization. Traditional USD-centric settlement systems face efficiency constraints and geopolitical risk. SkyW invests at the intersection of digital trade finance and financial technology — one of the most significant structural themes in the Belt and Road era.
digitalTrade.overviewP2: Our ecosystem includes Micro Connect (滴灌通) and other digital trade infrastructure platforms operating across the Middle East-China and Southeast Asia-China corridors. Target markets: Qianhai Shenzhen-Hong Kong Cooperation Zone, Middle East-China trade corridor, Southeast Asia cross-border e-commerce ecosystem.
digitalTrade.feature1Desc: Streamlining documentary trade finance through blockchain-verified digital instruments
digitalTrade.feature2Desc: On-chain accounts receivable enabling faster liquidity and cross-border transfer
digitalTrade.feature3Desc: Optimized settlement infrastructure reducing SWIFT friction for Belt and Road trade flows
digitalTrade.feature4Desc: Rebuilding trust and credit systems across fragmented cross-border supply chains

web3.title: Web3 Finance & Digital Assets
web3.shortDesc: An institutional-grade digital asset platform within Hong Kong’s regulated framework, spanning compliant fund structures, custody, multi-strategy allocation, and tokenized gold integration.
web3.heroSubtitle: Institutional-grade digital asset access within a fully regulated Hong Kong framework
web3.overviewTitle: Eminence Global Opportunity Fund — Compliant Digital Asset Platform
web3.overviewP1: SkyW's Eminence Global Opportunity Fund OFC (HK registration BUB855) provides a fully compliant multi-strategy digital asset vehicle: PwC audit, Fireblocks institutional custody, Walkers legal counsel, compliant with HK SFC and Cayman CIMA requirements. Monthly open subscriptions and redemptions.
web3.overviewP2: Full transparency with look-through audit reporting — a material upgrade from unregulated managed account structures. Target clients: family offices seeking compliant digital asset exposure, overseas Chinese capital requiring HK regulatory protection, Middle Eastern institutions allocating to stablecoins or on-chain gold.
web3.feature1Desc: HK SFC and Cayman CIMA compliant OFC, with PwC audit and Fireblocks institutional custody
web3.feature2Desc: Direct holdings, quantitative trend-following, derivatives hedging and stablecoin liquidity management
web3.feature3Desc: On-chain gold tokenization bridging physical precious metals with digital asset infrastructure
web3.feature4Desc: Open subscriptions and redemptions monthly with full transparency and look-through reporting

Contact.heroSubtitle: Connect with our team — we respond to all qualified investor inquiries within 24 hours
Contact.formInvestorType: Investor Type (e.g. Family Office, Institution, Sovereign Fund)
Contact.formMessage: Message — please describe your investment interest
Contact.formSuccessDesc: Thank you for your interest. Our investor relations team will contact you within 24 hours with the relevant fund materials and next steps.
Contact.formDisclaimer: Your information is treated in strict confidence. By submitting, you confirm you are a qualified / professional investor or represent an institutional entity. We respond within 24 hours.

Legal.privacyContent:
Skyward Holding Group ("SKYW" or "we") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data.

【Information Collection】We collect personal information only to the extent necessary for our business operations, including but not limited to your name, email address, telephone number, company name, and job title. You may be asked to provide such information when using our website services.

【Information Use】The personal information we collect is used for the following purposes: responding to your inquiries, providing the services or information you request, sending relevant business updates, and improving our website and service experience.

【Information Protection】We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption technology, access controls, and secure storage. All data processing complies with applicable data protection laws and regulations, including but not limited to the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486 of the Laws of Hong Kong).

【Information Sharing】We do not sell your personal information. In cases where required by law or necessary for business operations, we may share necessary information with affiliated companies and service providers, but only for the purposes stated in this Privacy Policy.

【Cookies】Our website uses cookies to enhance user experience. You can refuse cookies through your browser settings, but this may affect the functionality of certain website features.

【Your Rights】You have the right to request access to, correction, or deletion of your personal information held by us. To exercise these rights, please contact us at contact@skywgroup.com.

【Policy Updates】We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any material changes will be announced through our website or notified to you by email.
Legal.termsContent:
Welcome to the official website of Skyward Holding Group (hereinafter referred to as "this Website"). Please carefully read the following Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as "these Terms"). Accessing or using this Website signifies your agreement to be bound by these Terms.

【Service Description】This Website is operated by Skyward Holding Group to provide information services including group business introductions, news updates, and contact information.

【Intellectual Property】All content on this Website (including but not limited to text, images, logos, data, and designs) is protected by intellectual property laws. Without written authorization, no person may reproduce, modify, disseminate, or use the Website content for commercial purposes.

【Usage Restrictions】You agree not to use this Website for any illegal purposes, take any actions that may cause the Website system to malfunction, or attempt unauthorized access to any part of this Website.

【Disclaimer】The information provided on this Website is for general reference purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, legal opinions, tax advice, or any form of offer or solicitation. Any investment decisions should be based on independent professional judgment and due diligence. SKYW and its affiliated parties shall not be liable for any losses arising from the use of information on this Website.

【Third-Party Links】This Website may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for convenience only, and SKYW does not assume responsibility for the content or accuracy of third-party websites.

【Governing Law】These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.

【Modification Rights】SKYW reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time without prior notice. Continued use of this Website signifies your acceptance of the modified Terms.
Legal.disclaimerContent:
IMPORTANT: Investment involves risk

【Regulatory Disclosure】This Website is operated by Skyward Holding Group (hereinafter referred to as "SKYW" or the "Group"). The Group holds Type 6 (Advising on Corporate Finance) and Type 9 (Asset Management) licenses from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) (Central Entity Number: BRI618).

【Nature of Information】All information, content, data, and analysis (collectively, "Information") contained on this Website are for reference purposes only and do not constitute investment advice, legal opinions, tax advice, or any form of offer or solicitation to any person in any jurisdiction.

【Risk Warning】Investment involves risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Investment values may fall as well as rise, and investors may not recover their full or any investment capital. Any prospective investor should consult independent professional advisors before making an investment decision.

【Data Accuracy】While we strive to ensure the accuracy of the Information on this Website, SKYW does not make any express or implied guarantees regarding the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or timeliness of the Information. The Information is subject to change without notice.

【Forward-Looking Statements】This Website may contain "forward-looking statements" involving known and unknown risks, uncertainties, and other factors. Actual results may differ materially from those expressed or implied in forward-looking statements.

【Limitation of Liability】In no event shall SKYW, its directors, employees, or affiliated companies be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from accessing, using, or relying on the Information on this Website.

【Geographic Restrictions】This Website is not intended for publication or distribution to any person in any jurisdiction where such publication or distribution would constitute a violation of local laws or regulations. Anyone wishing to learn about the Group's specific products or services should contact a licensed representative in their locality.

【Continued Use】You confirm that you have read and understood this Disclaimer. Accessing this Website signifies your agreement to be bound by the terms of this Disclaimer.

disclaimerSections.heading: Regulatory Status
disclaimerSections.body: This website is operated by Skyward Holding Group ("SKYW"). Skyward Holding Group holds Type 6 (Advising on Corporate Finance) and Type 9 (Asset Management) licenses issued by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) of Hong Kong. All business activities are conducted in strict compliance with the Hong Kong regulatory framework.

disclaimerSections.heading: Not Investment Advice
disclaimerSections.body: All information contained on this website is for general reference purposes only and does not constitute an invitation, recommendation, offer, or solicitation to any person in any jurisdiction to buy, sell, or hold any securities, fund units, or other investment products. Any investment decision should be based on independent professional judgment and thorough due diligence. Investors should seek independent legal, financial, and tax advice before making any investment decision.

disclaimerSections.heading: Risk Warning
disclaimerSections.body: Investment involves risk. Fund prices may rise or fall, and investors may lose part or all of their invested capital. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Laws in different jurisdictions impose varying restrictions on fundraising activities and securities offerings. The content of this website has not been reviewed or approved by any regulatory authority in jurisdictions where it would not be applicable.

disclaimerSections.heading: Information Accuracy
disclaimerSections.body: Skyward Holding Group endeavours to ensure the accuracy of information on this website but makes no express or implied warranty as to the completeness, timeliness, or accuracy of the content. Information on this website may be updated at any time without prior notice, and the Group reserves the right to modify or remove any content at any time.

disclaimerSections.heading: Governing Law
disclaimerSections.body: These disclaimers and your use of this website are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Hong Kong. Any dispute arising from the use of this website shall be submitted to the non-exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Hong Kong.

privacySections.heading: Information We Collect
privacySections.body: Skyward Holding Group ("SKYW" or "we") collects information when you use this website and contact us directly, including: name, email address, phone number, and company name submitted through our contact form; and technical information automatically generated when you visit our website (such as IP address, browser type, and access time). We collect this information only to the extent necessary for business operations.

privacySections.heading: How We Use Your Information
privacySections.body: We use the information collected to: respond to your enquiries and communicate regarding potential cooperation; improve our website services and user experience; comply with applicable legal and regulatory obligations; and, where you have consented, send you Group updates and investment information. We will not use your personal information for any unauthorised commercial purpose.

privacySections.heading: Sharing and Disclosure
privacySections.body: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share necessary information with trusted third parties in the following circumstances: service providers who support our website operations and technical infrastructure; regulatory authorities or law enforcement agencies where required by law; and in other circumstances with your explicit consent.

privacySections.heading: Data Security
privacySections.body: We implement industry-standard technical and administrative security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. However, internet transmission is not absolutely secure, and we cannot guarantee the absolute security of data transmitted over a network.

privacySections.heading: Cookie Policy
privacySections.body: This website uses cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience and analyse website traffic. You may manage or decline cookies through your browser settings, although this may affect the functionality of certain features on this website. The cookies we use do not contain personally identifiable information.

privacySections.heading: Your Rights
privacySections.body: Under applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, correct, or delete personal information we hold about you, and to withdraw any consent previously given. To exercise these rights, please contact us through the website's contact page. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe.

privacySections.heading: Policy Updates
privacySections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via website notice or other appropriate means. Your continued use of this website constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy. If you have any questions, please contact us through the contact page.

termsSections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
termsSections.body: Welcome to the official website of Skyward Holding Group. By accessing or using this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please cease using this website immediately. Skyward Holding Group reserves the right to revise these terms at any time, and revisions take effect upon publication.

termsSections.heading: Permitted Use
termsSections.body: You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and not to engage in any activity that interferes with or disrupts its normal operation, including but not limited to: unauthorised access to our systems; distribution of malware or harmful content; attempting to circumvent security measures; or using this website for any fraudulent or illegal activity.

termsSections.heading: Intellectual Property
termsSections.body: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, images, charts, logos, trademarks, and software, is the proprietary property of Skyward Holding Group or used under lawful licence, and is protected by Hong Kong and international intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or publicly display any content on this website in any form without our prior written consent.

termsSections.heading: Disclaimer of Warranties
termsSections.body: The content of this website is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties. Skyward Holding Group makes no warranty as to the accuracy, completeness, suitability, or uninterrupted availability of the website content. To the extent permitted by law, Skyward Holding Group accepts no liability for any loss arising from accessing or using this website.

termsSections.heading: Third-Party Links
termsSections.body: This website may contain links to third-party websites for user convenience only. Skyward Holding Group accepts no responsibility for the content, privacy practices, or services of any third-party website and does not endorse or recommend any such websites. You access third-party websites at your own risk.

termsSections.heading: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
termsSections.body: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Any dispute arising from or related to these terms or the use of this website shall first be resolved through amicable negotiation; failing which, both parties agree to submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Hong Kong under Hong Kong law.

Partnership.typesSubtitle: We offer flexible cooperation structures and welcome institutions, distribution partners, and industry capital to explore opportunities with us.
Partnership.type1Desc: Co-founding OFC or LPF funds with SFC-licensed financial institutions. Skyward handles fundraising, investment, management, and exit (the full fund lifecycle), while partners provide licensing support and middle/back-office operations. Suitable for asset managers and securities firms holding SFC Type 4/9 licenses.
Partnership.type2Desc: Distribution partners introduce Skyward's fund products to qualified investors and earn agreed front-end sales commissions and management fee sharing. Suitable for wealth management firms, licensed financial advisors (FAs), family offices, and private banks.
Partnership.type3Desc: Joint investment at the project level across IPO cornerstone, cross-border M&A, commodities, and energy projects. Both parties co-invest and share returns proportionally. Suitable for peer institutions, industrial capital, and sovereign wealth funds.
Partnership.type4Desc: Leveraging our Qianhai QFLP and QDIE dual channels to provide compliant offshore investment access for qualified mainland institutional investors. Skyward assists with channel establishment, compliance filing, and cross-border fund arrangements. Suitable for mainland private funds, industrial groups, and HNW families.
Partnership.type5Desc: Establishing long-term strategic partnerships with financial institutions, industrial groups, and professional service firms to share resource networks, project pipelines, and market opportunities. Formalised through a strategic cooperation agreement with ongoing collaboration mechanisms.
Partnership.processSubtitle: From initial contact to formal cooperation, we are committed to advancing every partnership with professionalism and efficiency.
Partnership.step1Desc: Both parties discuss cooperation intent, share respective capabilities and needs, and assess feasibility.
Partnership.step2Desc: Exchange credential materials and conduct baseline due diligence to confirm cooperation foundation and compliance requirements.
Partnership.step3Desc: Reach consensus on cooperation model, responsibilities, and benefit sharing; sign a Letter of Intent (LOI) or Memorandum of Understanding (MOU).
Partnership.step4Desc: Legal teams draft and review the formal cooperation agreement; both parties confirm and sign to establish the official partnership.
Partnership.step5Desc: Establish regular communication and reporting mechanisms to jointly advance cooperation projects and continuously generate partnership value.
Partnership.ctaSubtitle: If you wish to discuss any of the above partnership models, please reach out to our business development team by email or through the contact form. We commit to responding within 2 business days.

Footer.companyDesc: Skyward Holding Group is an international financial institution licensed by the Hong Kong SFC (Type 6 & Type 9).
Footer.licenseNote: Skyward Holding Group holds Type 6 and Type 9 licenses issued by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) of Hong Kong.
Footer.riskWarning: Investment involves risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
